Notice Of Motion For Order Amending Judment
Off Calendar Apr-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. KENNETH H. MOSS, TEL. NO. (805) 777-1175 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORPORATION'S Motion For Order Amending Judgment IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

David M. Kritzer, Esq. appeared for plaintiff General Electric Capital One Corporation.
No appearance by defendants Max Copy & Print LLC or Garima Rai.
Default entered against defendant Max Copy & Print LLC on April 24, 2008.
Default entered against defendant Garima Rai on April 22, 2008.
Order granting waiver of witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 25, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on April 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff General Electric Capital One Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Max Copy & Print LLC and Garima Rai as follows:

Damages/Principal - $310,318.96.
Prejudgment Interest - $17,258.84.
Attorney's Fees - $4,250.00.
Costs - $480.00, for a total of $332,307.80.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
